reviews.text:
I was Pleased and satisfied wit the job that John Scatuorchio my attorney in my case Did,
i will recommend this law firm to anyone that's looking for an Good attorney..  Thank you JS
Very trusted law firm. They make you feel safe and secure. When u need help they are there for you. They got my business and I definitely recommend them to everyone.

I had John as the attorney on my case and he was great. He got my charges dropped in a very quick amount of time. He was aggressive in fighting my case. Thanks John... For making sure I wasn't convicted for something I didn't do.

Was very pleased with his service. Always took the time to answer any questions I had about my case and made sure I was comfortable with
all of the steps in the process. I received the results I desired in my case due to his diligence and hard work in working with the prosecutor to make an arrangement.
Great experience and highly recommended thank you again!!!

I have never trusted a lawyer on my 1st consultation until meeting with A. Ladan, and K. Carsten.  They are straight shooters that will let you know exactly how it is and what to expect.  By end of 1st meeting, their confidence rubbed off on me and let me live a normal life w/out the anxiety of what would happen next.  They are 10 steps ahead and the charisma and strategy really sold me.  In one sentence, "These guys are THE BEST IN ORLANDO!"   HANDS DOWN.  Honest, Courteous, Fearless, Well-Planned, and my fav...Great Communication and EXCELLENT RESULTS.  Not a day spent in court, and will give u the peace of mind u need.  Not afraid to FIGHT for you, like alot of other lawyers in town, and "Plea" is not in their vocabulary.  They make u feel like family, and treat u like it.  Will definitely refer to ALL.   Just my 2 cents.  ;)

Amir Ladan was extremely honest with my husband and I about our son's issues with the juvenile detention center and his upcoming trial. I can't tell you enough how much he helped us sleep better and soothed our nerves about what getting our son through this terrible mistake. Thank you Amir, from the bottom of our hearts. Andrea & Tom

Randy Hillman helped me out on a 2 year case, he was very professional and always available if you had questions.  Randy and his secretary Yvonne were always on top of things and looking out for the best in any situation. I would highly recommend this law firm.
great  person  help  me a lot with my business property

Randy was very patient in my case that lasted over 2 years , thanks to Mr. Hillman's  effective work in my case i was awarded majority custody of my (2) beautiful daughters . I am forever grateful for his hard work and determination. THANK YOU

Mr. Hillman is the most honest, loyal, outgoing, reasonable, and professional attorney I have had an opportunity to meet!  He is honest and friendly, and he will ensure that your case is handled in a professional manner.  His secretary is also highly professional and she is very nice.  She will always ensure high quality and timely communication between you and Mr. Hillman.
We are working with Randy Hillman for a few years and very happy with his service and knowledge of real estate laws. Very good lawyer and I will highly recommend.
Layback attorney. Never gave me a feed back I had to keep calling his office for answers. He is NOT a aggressive lawyer!!

I am located here in Fort Myers FL. This attorneys office helped me out. I was dealing with a hit and run not sure what to do and were to start if it was not for Amanda S. I would’ve been stuck in the blind.  I am glad I chose this firm on the first call they did not hesitate they started working without giving me the run around like other firms was doing. They were able to get all my personal injury damages taken care, my pain resulted and also a lump some of money to help me out at the end. Thank you so much !! You will not be disappointed.

I was in a car accident in 2019 and the Law Office of Stanley E. Johnson help me get compensated as well as helped me with personal injuries. After going to the chiropractor for a couple months I felt better and not to long after that I got a check in the mail. Greatly appreciate all the wonderful people that helped me out. I'm definitely going to refer a friend or family member if anything else was to happen in the future. Much love guys and thanks again!!
He tells you like it is! Thank you Gary!
This place sucks
MR.LUIS ORTIZ IS VERY PROFFESSIONAL,IN ALL ASPECTS FULLY RECOMENDED INMIGRATION NEEDS..

Excellent, we are very grateful for your work. During the immigration process, you were an empathetic and patient professional, always willing to explain clearly. Thanks to your support, we achieved positive results.
Attorney Luis Ortiz and his team are highly professional and friendly. I am very satisfied with their help and service on my Visa-1 case, which has now been approved. I highly recommend them!

Attorney Ortiz is very professional and cares about your case. He’s very knowledgeable and will help you on every step of the way during the process. I totally recommend 100% the service of attorney Luis Ortiz.

It took me a few days to post my comment, the reason being simple: I couldn't find the words to thank Attorney Luis for his help. Even the word "thank you" falls short of his professionalism, but above all, his humanity and dedication to service. Without a doubt, one of the few lawyers who delivers results. My admiration and respect for his profession and high quality of service. Thank you, Attorney Luis, for blessing us. Sincerely, Pastor Freddy Cueva.

I had the pleasure of working with Attorney Ortiz, and I couldn't be more satisfied with the experience. He is incredibly trustworthy and ensures that you are fully informed about every detail of your case. His considerate nature and people-first approach make you feel valued and understood. Mr. Ortiz goes above and beyond to find the best possible solution for your situation. I highly recommend his services to anyone in need of legal assistance.
Mr. Ortiz was great would recommend his services to anyone. Very satisfied!!!
Mr Ortiz is professional, knowledgeable, and very pleasant to deal with. He made the whole process virtually stress-free.  Highly recommend.! Thank you.

Speaking with Attorney Ortiz brings peace of mind; he exudes confidence, honesty, and the love of God!
Thank you, Attorney Ortiz, for your hard work!
Luis is incredibly dedicated, very responsible and attentive to every step of the process... 1000% recommended!
Excellent service from lawyer Luis Ortiz, I am extremely satisfied.
Excellent lawyer, a blessing

Attorney Ortiz was great, and really helpful!
I will continue to work with him for my citizenship application.
Excellent, knowledgeable and very professional.

Great guy. Went out of his way to give me advice, and even asked for me to follow up after the issue was resolved.

100% recommend.
Awesome lawyer
Nicest man. Professional!
A fine example of what an attorney should be like. Friendly and infornative. Makes you feel like he is there for you.

Bad attorney. Told me how he was going to handle the child support case and instead I paid more than I should have because he didnt bring up the fact I was already a single father and no credit was given. Brought this to his attention a week after hearing, he says he no longer practices in this field and immediately excused himself from the case. This guy is untrustworthy.  He says it's a Orlando lawyer.  Untrue. Its him.
Hashi genuinely listens to your concerns and takes the time to craft a customized estate plan unique to your family's needs. I highly recommend her firm!
My experience with Richards Legal was positive and I would recommend them.
Understanding, compassionate and detail oriented. I had a very good experience with Hashi Richards.
I highly recommend Richards Legal for your Estate planning and Probate needs! Ms. Richard's is highly knowledgeable and cares about her clients and staff. You are always treated kindly and promptly.

Working with Hashi from Richards Legal was an AMAZING experience. She helped me navigate through the whole process, and answered any questions that I had (I had a lot!) without any judgement. I was able to get all of my documents done in a very timely manner. Plus, she had a notary service that came right to my house. I was able to get all of the documents done without ever having to leave the house. I HIGHLY recommend her services!

Mrs. Richards went above and beyond with our case. We wanted to have our state planning and protection documents for our kids done in a very short time before going out of the state, which I thought it was going to be impossible. Let me tell you, I would say she did it in record time. She did not hesitate to help us and do everything we needed. She was very professional, knowledgeable and made everything very simple for us. Certainly exceeded our expectations. If you come across her, don't look any longer. I recommend her 100%. I'm sure you will not be disappointed. Mrs. Richards, once again, thank you very much! You are the best!!! May God continue to bless you and your family!
I had an excellent experience with Richard Legal, Hashi is a very professional and knowledgeable attorney, I highly recommend her for whoever's needs help with their case.

Attorney Hashi Richards is an experienced immigration, trademark, and estate planning attorney. I consulted with Attorney Hashi on trademark issues. Specifically on the different classes and what would be most strategic for me. She clearly explained my different legal options. Her valuable advice led me to make the best decision and I strongly recommend her legal services. She is quick, succinct, and is truly dedicated to her clients and their success!
This legal team of personal injuries, has been of great support, they are professional, efficient and effective, they have helped to make the process fast, I am very grateful.
Bike crash downtown — totally shaken up. The staff was amazing, helped me feel in control again.
Best car crash attorney! Very efficient and helpful throughout the whole process.
Best car accident lawyer in town. I Definitely recommend. My experience was smooth and quick!

My mom hired McBride to represent her in her automobile accident almost a yr it took this worthless attorney to accomplish NOTHING. We called several times to speak to somebody and never got a return call, never spoke directly to attorney or met them at their office. Secretary when i finally got a hold of her she said my moms case was closed and the next day my mother found all her paper work outside her door. PLEASE DO NOT HIRE THIS ATTORNEYS they will scam you and will not fight your case, they will only let time go by so they get their money and than close your case and not get you nothing.

Wish I could give zero stars this attorney was not professional at all he lied and said that i was not keeping in contact and he has all of my updated information. When I had court on April 18th Duarte said he would contact me and went completely ghost. Now today is June 25th I have court and he is not here withdrew from my case because he said I wasn’t keeping in contact with him which is a lie. Also his male secretary is also extremely rude and not helpful at all! I called to see who is my attorney he just said somebody from the bar in a very nasty rude tone! IF YOU HATE YOUR JOB THEN FIND A NEW CAREER!!!! Invest your money in a better attorney because Duarte and his staff is not reliable at all

A very caring, serious, and responsible lawyer. He helped me a lot with my divorce. I highly recommend him... I've recommended him and everyone is very grateful... Excellent professional work. He speaks English and Spanish.
The lawyer was an excellent human being and very professional; I highly recommend him.

Very good law firm. Melanie is awesome she answers any questions you have & was very helpful throughout my whole case.  They keep you updated & try their best to get you the best outcome possible. I never leave reviews but I had to for them. Very good law firm!
Very professional.
Carlos Diez-Arguelles and Maria Tejedor handled my case a few years ago. They worked very hard for me and my family and were able to get a favorable verdict.

Desiree Sanchez of the Sanchez Law group was extremely helpful in the filing of our Ladybird deeds on our properties at 650 West ave and 1000 West ave, both in Miami Beach and provided us with clear instructions in the filings.
I would recommend her as an attorney ond once again thank her her for her assistance......Joseph Horstmann

Attorney Sanchez has again gone above and beyond our expectations. She and her staff handled our legal issue with professionalism and proficiency. I would not hesitate for a moment to retain her services again. Thank you for everything!
I DO NOT RECOMMEND HER, AT LEAST IN THE REAL ESTATE INDUSTRY!!! I DO NOT RECOMMEND HER!
What a great attorney!  Very reasonably priced probate attorney.  Polite and to the point.  I highly recommend her.

I wish I could give this lawyer no stars. This attorney did nothing for my mom. She DID NOT explain anything to my mom about anything. This is a very incompetent lawyer. If you want a circus of running around and you want to waste thousands of dollars then this is the attorney for you, otherwise stay clear of this law firm.

Very happy with the Service I received by the Sanchez Law Group. From the very first day I started my process till the very end,working with Omayra Huerta who is very knowledgeable of the process and took her time to explain everything in great detail, made the process so much smoother. Attorney Sanchez also followed up with me, and made herself available for any other questions I may have had. If your in search of a really good Law firm with a great team to help you through your process this is the place to go. SANCHEZ LAW GROUP.....they are great at what they do. Highly Recommend! A + Service.

Sanchez Law Group was very professional.  I worked one on one with Omayra Huerta and she was excellent in keeping me inform and providing guidance throughout the entire process making things a bit less painless.  She is detailed oriented and always show a positive attitude.  Omayra is definitely a great and valuable representative for your firm here in Kissimmee.

Dealing with Sanchez Law Group was an easy and pleasant experience from start to finish. Omayra Huerta was extremely helpful and answered all are questions.
Great service and people at Sanchez Law.

Being my first bankruptcy  experience after dealing with hardships and struggles the Sanchez law firm help me through it all,  make in it easy and seeing a light at the end of the tunnel. I would like to give a special thanks to Mrs. Omayra Huerta who was there every step of the way, her knowledge and professionalism made the difference!  Thank you.

Due to the unpleasant situation I was experiencing at the time, Omayra Huerta's support and help made me feel more positive and confident. Her support and professionalism were very comforting to me. She is a true professional and knows exactly what she's doing. Thank you, Sanchez Law Group.

Going through Bankruptcy is extremely stressful, its not something you are proud of nor want to ever have to do.  Life brings on many trials and tribulations, unfortunately we have been faced with them.  Due to those life challenges bankruptcy for us was a necessity and we are very thankful to Sanchez Law for their dedication, hard work and professionalism. We were filled with relief knowing they were taking care of us and helping us through one of the most difficult times in our life. I highly recommend them to anyone faced with bankruptcy! Omayra Huerta was awesome and she was truly there for us! Thank you to everyone at Sanchez Law !

Good afternoon ,mr and mrs from Sanchez Law Group ,I am very grateful for all the super profesional work that I have received from all of you and very special from Omaira Huertas,who is a very high level person and profesional within her specialty as a bankrupt paralegal,I am very grateful to all of you and I will recommend you those who need your services ,thanks very much

From the moment I started the process, Ms. Vicky and later Ms. Omaira were a very important support and assistance for this event that I unfortunately had to manage. They were always available to answer any questions I had. Thank you very much, and keep it up. That warmth makes all the difference. Hugs.
Omayra Huerta handled my case and was very responsive and on top of everything. Every staff member from the attorneys to the receptionist was polite, professional, and helpful.

I would like to extend my gratitude to the professionals at Sanchez Law Group. My experience with there Law firm is second to none. They are kind and courteous and made me feel at ease with my situation. They answered all my questions made sure I had all the information I needed. Ms Hernandez, Ms Vega and Ms Sanchez are second to none. I highly recomend there services. Once again thank you guy's.

This law firm is a joke.No Empathy whatsoever. I came to them with an extremely sensitive matter with family law. My emails were barely ever answered, I had to call to remind them of my case i was never informed of what was going on until i kept calling the office to get an update and not only that, mid case they decided to drop my case and leave me stranded, their response was I do not want to go to court and have too many cases. I am a single mom I scavenged to be able to provide a retainer yet was treated inhumanely. Now i have a case pending , no money left, and no lawyer. I am back to square 1. Also whenever my email was responded to it was addressed to a different name and the legal paperwork attatched where not even mines.I am now getting consults around town and am being informed that this lawfirm isn't very professional or knowledgeable and are very lazy.
Very helpful staff willing to go the extra mile for you. Hope I never need them again but if I did I would be glad to.
Going through a legal matter is always stressful.  The staff made me feel at ease and confident that I was in good hands. Attorney Sanchez worked hard and I’m extremely satisfied with the outcome.
Great law firm. I really appreciate what they have done for me. I will continue to recommend them to friends and family.
Very helpful staff and great service altogether.

I am honored to write this review for Attorney Joseph R. Greschner, a truly exceptional legal professional whose dedication, compassion, and integrity set him apart in the legal field. From the very first interaction, Mr. Greschner demonstrated a level of respect and professionalism that immediately made me feel comfortable and supported. He treats his clients as equals—never as just another case or number. It is clear that he genuinely cares about the people he represents, not only in terms of their legal matters but also their overall well-being.

What impressed me most was Mr. Greschner’s ability to actively listen and take the time to understand my concerns on a deeper level. He is not the kind of attorney who rushes you through the process. Instead, he makes sure that every question is answered, every concern is addressed, and that his clients feel fully informed and empowered every step of the way. His empathy and patience speak volumes about the kind of person he is—not just as an attorney, but as a human being.

Throughout the course of my case, Mr. Greschner remained focused, detail-oriented, and fiercely committed to achieving the best possible outcome. He worked diligently to ensure that my voice was heard and that my goals were prioritized. Even in the most stressful moments, his calm and reassuring demeanor gave me peace of mind. He never made me feel like a burden, and he consistently showed compassion, understanding, and a sincere desire to help.

Attorney Greschner exemplifies what it means to be an advocate. He fights for his clients with determination and fairness, while maintaining the highest level of professionalism and ethics. He goes above and beyond to resolve issues to the best of his ability, and it is clear that he takes pride in delivering results that truly make a difference in his clients’ lives.

reviews.text: I filed a case with them, they never responded, they did nothing, and they didn't refund my money. I recommend never doing anything with them.
Worst

The same thing happened to me as to many people here. I gave them my down payment to start my process, and months went by and they didn't submit anything. People, don't waste your time with these kinds of people. I really don't know how they have a license to work in this field if they're so incompetent. The best thing they did was not start my case and they returned my deposit. 🙏🏼

This review is for Latinos looking for reliable lawyers to handle their immigration paperwork. Please don't use these people.

This is a sad story. A few years ago, my partner and I went to start our marriage paperwork process. They charged us $500 to begin and said it would take a week. Two or three weeks passed, and they never even sent us an update on the status. We called, and they didn't have a clear answer. My partner went to the office, and the receptionists treated her like a beggar several times. One day, we went together. My partner was furious because she had worked hard for that $500, and these people wouldn't take responsibility. At the reception desk, next to us, was a young man telling us how these so-called lawyers had botched his paperwork by misspelling his name from the beginning, forcing him to pay for the correction. He was also telling us how he had waited a long time for an answer. He had spent approximately $8,700 on the process.

All of this made us feel like we were being scammed. When we spoke to the lawyer, he told us we'd have to wait a month or more for the process to even begin, so there was nothing we could do. We got angry and told them they were scammers taking advantage of Latinos. They kicked us out, saying they were going to call the police and that they weren't going to give us our money back because the $500 was just because the lawyer had taken the time to check our names in the system. They were shameless.

The next day, the company owner called us from Miami, threatening us and saying that if we called again or asked for our money back, he would tell the sheriff to have us arrested.

In the end, we lost our money and the time we needed to get our case processed. We left humiliated, scared, and angry. I don't want this to happen to anyone else.

I hope you can read this before going to those people, before it's too late.
The experience was frustrating. I felt like I had to constantly chase them to get a response.
Unprofessional service. I had to call repeatedly to get basic information about my own case.

DON'T LET THEM STEAL YOUR MONEY HERE!

These people had my case for a year. We paid $2,000 for them to "start" the process, but they never did. We got tired of calling and requesting appointments. We even went to their offices in person to request them, and when the day of the appointment arrived, they told us they had nothing scheduled. The "lawyer" handling our case left the firm, and they never notified us that our case would be transferred to another "lawyer." We only found out because we insisted on an appointment. When we spoke with the paralegal, he told us they didn't have my case documents because the other lawyer had taken them. I don't know how they intended to continue with the case if they didn't have my documents and never contacted me. We spent six months fighting for a refund. They finally gave it to us last week, but to our surprise, THEY STOLE $1,000 FROM US because they refused to give us the full amount back. They only gave us half, even though they NEVER even started the process. UGH! What an unprofessional and negligent signature!

I arrived at my appointment 10 minutes early and they made me wait in the waiting room for an hour and 15 minutes. When I finally got to the appointment, it was via Zoom, completely impersonal, with a lawyer who only asked for my alien registration number and told me that my asylum case cost thousands of dollars and that I had to pay it as soon as possible without even inquiring about my situation. Money is important, but so is being ethical, and yet they have terrible reviews regarding payments and the service once you pay. I grabbed my things and left! They gave me a really bad feeling.

Unprofessional! Irresponsible! Unpunctual! They made me travel for an in-person appointment, and 30 minutes before my appointment, after traveling for approximately 3 hours, the secretary in Orlando called me to say they couldn't see me for reasons they couldn't explain. They're so sorry! Such unpunctual and unreliable people to start any immigration process... they can't play with people's time! I took a day off work, a day of doing a million things, to travel, and I really lost my whole day because of this irresponsible team.

One of the worst experiences with a law firm.
Sanabria Lawyers are irresponsible. No one seems to know what they're doing; every time I call, they give me different information, and it seems like no one really knows what's going on with my case. Furthermore, they take hours to answer calls, and when you finally get through, they don't resolve anything.

I've made several appointments, and they've never returned my call, which demonstrates a total lack of seriousness and commitment to their clients. Honestly, I deeply regret having gone through my asylum process with them. I do not recommend this place to anyone looking for responsible or professional service.

Be very careful with this agency. They're very diligent in contacting you, until you make the mistake of paying the down payment. There, you have to initiate a search to even speak with the assigned paralegal, who also tells you they'll call you back at a specific time, but never does. I was without a contract for over a month after paying the down payment. When I did get a phone call, the paralegal treated me arrogantly, even though the day before, she'd stood me up with the phone appointment. I asked for a refund, and it took them two months to deliver an incomplete check from which fees were deducted for the supposed work they did on my behalf (two emails, two calls). If you want a legal team that's truly interested in your case and helping you through these moments of great anguish and vulnerability, this isn't the place. I wouldn't recommend them for a million years. Terrible service and zero communication.

If I could give them zero stars, I would. I signed a contract for a nursing home with this joke of a firm, and they sent the wrong information, literally giving me the biggest headache ever! They never fixed anything and just passed the buck. Once, I went to see my lawyer handling my case, and he was sitting on the table playing on his phone with his feet up, while the front desk told me he was in a "meeting." I had to hire another firm to fix the problem they brazenly created and then refused to address! To this day, I've requested a thousand times to cancel the contract and get a refund, and they haven't responded, avoiding my calls and procrastinating on everything. I'm still wondering what happened to my money! Their customer service is terrible. When you want to contact them with questions, they say they'll call you back, and they never do. The people at the front desk have no idea how to provide quality customer service, much less communicate with their superiors, apparently. Simply put, the biggest mistake I've made in this country was trusting and paying this circus.

I want to thank you and highlight the excellent service. I'm very attentive. Thank you, Giovanna, thank you, Nathalie.
Success!

It's all awful. It's really not worth hiring these people. I don't know why they have so many high ratings. Based on my experience, I wouldn't even give them one star. Communication with the staff is impossible, both by email and especially by phone. Only the sales and payments departments respond 😤. They don't take care of your case. If I hadn't been keeping an eye on it, I probably would have been deported. They charge a lot for a very low-quality service that's far from professional. I've been trying to contact them for over a week to resolve an urgent matter, and it's impossible to get them to reply to an email or return your call. This is just a brief summary of some of the experiences I've had with this "lawyer" firm 😒😒

I was interviewed at the Orlando office on Wednesday. I traveled from Tampa, missed a day of work, spent a lot of money on gas, and unfortunately, the experience was very disappointing. I arrived with high expectations of receiving clear and professional guidance on my case, but I left feeling cheated.
First, I was never informed that the consultation would be via Zoom, which would have saved me time, money, and effort. Second, the attorney didn't seem familiar with my situation, nor did she offer me concrete options. I was the one who had to mention possible alternatives I'd seen on social media with other attorneys, and only then would she respond with, "Oh, yeah, maybe." When we go to these types of consultations, we do so with the hope of finding real answers and professional support. Therefore, I recommend that in the future they be more clear about communicating whether the appointment will be virtual, so that clients can make informed decisions and don't feel cheated like I did after losing my day and my money.

Don't even think about it. Because I didn't read the reviews, I've been with them for three years. They charged me $7,000 and they don't defend anyone. I had more than five lawyers, and in the end, they assigned me one the day before, and it was a complete failure. Look for other lawyers; they're useless.

I'm not at all satisfied with the service. I paid in full for a process and they didn't manage anything; on the contrary, the whole process is delayed. It's worth noting that my case goes through many hands and nobody does any work.

Don’t waste your time. Do not recommend this office. They supposedly were running late on their appointments, but one hour and 20min wait was not running late, that was unacceptable. And when I finally got into the office, my BIGGEST surprise, instead of real person, it was an iPad seating over the desk. I drove 40min to the office, wait an hour and 20min to be seen AND it wasn’t even meeting a real person face to face but a virtual meeting??!! That was abusive and completely disrespectful, there is not right to play with people time like this! I could have taken a virtual meeting instead of asking for permission at work!!
reviews.ownerResponse: I spoke with you in person and you decided to leave...maybe you need therapy.

reviews.text:
I am completely disappointed with the service I received! 😡 I was drawn in by their advertising promising a "free first appointment," which turned out to be misleading. The professional attention was poor, and communication between lawyer and client is nonexistent.
I never received an update on my case; they don't answer calls or emails. I always had to be the one to call countless times and leave messages with the billing department. "They are the only ones who answer and take notes." This is unacceptable.
Sanabria & Associates is just a facade, social media presence, and advertising. A terrible experience that I wouldn't wish on anyone!

Don't waste your time or money. The client is just a number that represents dollars. This firm has absolutely no respect for the client's situation.

Terrible service. There's never any communication with the lawyer you're paying, the paralegal is inefficient and delays communication, the "free" consultation is a lie—they charge for it during the process. They don't meet the timelines they quote for the initial visit, and they never provide case updates.
The only people you can contact are the billing department, and they just take notes during the call. They never return your call or email.

I do not recommend them!!!

I don't recommend it at all. They made me waste two months to go to a consultation that was free, and then after posting it until today, they tell me it's worthless. They charge $150 for the consultation. They're abusive.

They changed my lawyer about four times, and the one I got didn't even know what to tell us. When I had my court hearing, I wasn't prepared. They don't try to defend you, they just try to squeeze money out of you. It's a whole business when you're practically putting your life in their hands 😣

Attorney Rodney Hernandez from Sanabria & Associates is the, not only a great lawyer but a special person, his humble, knowledgeable, familiar and have a big heart to help everyone.

My appointment is coming up soon, and they haven't even sent my paperwork yet. They are a completely unprofessional firm. Please don't waste your money here. Monica Hernandez gave us a terrible consultation. She looked for everything on the internet, didn't know what she was talking about, didn't let us talk, and practically kicked us out. DON'T WASTE YOUR TIME AND MONEY.

i have been working with Me. Chico himself and he is fair and goes above and beyond for his clients even at his own expense. He truly fight for the like guy, I know because I'm one of them. Best lawyer in central Fl

If you are looking for an insurance attorney who is knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely invested in helping their clients, I highly recommend CJ Law Firm. They go above and beyond, and I’m extremely grateful for the excellent service they provided.

I highly recommend CJ Law Firm to anyone dealing with a property or home insurance claim. They are honest, responsive, and extremely effective. I’m very grateful for their help and the results they achieved for me.

Going through a divorce was one of the most challenging times in my life, but Michele at Lebron Law made it manageable and far less stressful than I expected. As a Florida resident dealing with complex issues like child support, custody (timesharing), and property division, I needed someone with deep knowledge of state laws – and that’s exactly what I got.

She was always responsive, returning calls and emails promptly, and took the time to explain every option clearly without overwhelming me. What stood out most was the genuine empathy and calm guidance – she truly cared about protecting my interests and my well-being. The outcome was
better than I hoped for: a fair marital settlement agreement and child support arrangement that works for everyone.

The whole team was professional, organized, and supportive from consultation to final judgment. If you’re facing a divorce in Florida, don’t hesitate to reach out to Michele Lebron. They’re simply the best – worth every penny for the peace of mind and strong results!

reviews.text:
I had a very bad divorce and Attorney Lebron did a great job representing me. My case was in Volusia County and this is the first time she tried a case in Volusia County.  Due to the previous Judge retiring.  Cases are very backed up in Volusia County and the process is very slow. There were a couple of hiccups in communication with paralegals and office support. However, I’ve always maintained that open line of communication with Attorney Lebron whether through email, phone call, or text. She has many clients and relies on her staff to do their part. I must say she is at the top of her game because staff changes were made, and like anything, when something doesn’t work, you do what you have to do to fix it.
I would refer Attorney Lebron in a heartbeat. She is very knowledgeable and empathetic, and she will fight for you. By the way, she did win my case.
As per money wise, yes, it can be costly, but she was always upfront with the cost and you have to remember: Anything can happen along the way. Whether a divorce, child support or custody battle, etc., It may start off amicable but it can get very ugly when the other party shows their true colors. Thank you, Attorney Lebron.
The service was amazing. They will take care of your needs as quick as they can without breaking your pocket.

READ ALL THE REVIEWS. I wouldn’t leave more or less. When I first looked into LeBron for my child paternity case she was very open and forward about it building my confidence. I hired her for the trial cause everything was all done. The case had been going on for almost 2 years I had another attorney beforehand and did a lot pro bono after the fact. Everything was on the docket and filed already. She Quoted me 7k$ up front for my retainer she said normally it would be 5k$ but she wanted 7k to get caught up. We paid it up front. One thing is it was very hard to get ahold of her for my case or to find out any information. My big thing I wanted addressed was child support during the trial and that I wanted custody M-F. She ignored a lot of points that I wanted to make. The trial lasted all day. Almost 2-3 hours wasted on a field trip topic and not addressing the main concerns. Child support was never address and therefore continued when it ended up being a 50/50 time share after everything was said and done she itemized me about another 1600$ for after the fact and then said if I wanted to continue with a child support case she wanted another retainer of 2500$.  All I can say is read the reviews. Most are after money and not listening to you.  You hired them. The main priority is that they should be listening to you and your needs and she did not.  I had many appointments for call backs and I would go weeks without hearing anything and would have to call back and complain about getting a callback. I felt like I was more of a pain than getting anywhere. For the amount I paid I should’ve went with someone else I would’ve gotten what I wanted out of the case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kevin, thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are sorry to hear that you were dissatisfied with your experience and appreciate the opportunity to provide some clarification.

Our records reflect that our firm was solely retained to represent you in your paternity matter, as outlined in your signed engagement agreement with a single case number (which, by the way, we won - all issues were in your favor). The child support case you referenced was filed under a separate docket number and was not part of the legal services we were hired to handle. We understand how important these issues are, which is why we discussed the need for a separate retainer. We also encourage you to review the terms of your engagement agreement, which detail the scope of representation, fee structure, and communication protocols are outlined in the "Welcome Email" every new client receives. Our goal is always to provide effective representation within the parameters of the services we are retained for.

We regret that your expectations were not fully met and take your feedback seriously as we continue to improve our client service. Should you wish to further discuss your concerns or request a copy of your engagement documents, please feel free to contact our office directly.

— Lebron Law, PLLC

reviews.text:
Beware of Florida Disability Services. I was very disappointed with the customer service I received and felt that my experience as an English-speaking client was not handled professionally.

I visited the office twice in February 2026 (mid-February and again toward the end of the month). The office hours are limited to Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday, and when I initially tried contacting them by phone, I was unable to reach anyone for some time. When I finally did call, the phone system provided prompts for both English and Spanish speakers.

During my first visit, I briefly met with a Social Security lawyer and the receptionist. She explained the consultation process and the associated appointment fee. Based on that information, I returned for a second visit, scheduled my consultation, and paid the required fee.

At that time, I politely asked the receptionist if my appointment reminder email could be sent in English, as the communication I received was entirely in Spanish. I suggested that translating it using a simple tool such as Google Translate would be helpful. Unfortunately, she seemed unsure how to assist.

About a week later, I received an email stating that my appointment had been canceled and that the establishment does not accept English-speaking clients. This was surprising and frustrating, especially since I had spoken only English during my first visit. If that policy exists, it should have been communicated clearly during my initial visit or at the time of scheduling.

Clear and honest communication is essential, especially for individuals seeking assistance with Social Security disability benefits, where time and guidance are very important. I hope this feedback encourages the office to be more transparent with future clients so that people do not waste valuable time seeking help.

reviews.text:
If you are looking for a great Law Firm to fight your Social Security Disability Claim; then I Highly Recommend "The Lawrence Law Firm" .  Let me tell you why they are the best...because they are "caring" and they understand the challenges that you are going through with this very difficult process.  To be honest the time was long for me (3-years); but that is because I started with a different law firm that did my initial application...but I could never get a direct person nor timely response to messages I had left them; nor did they give me direction...I was pretty much doing everything myself. I was treated like a number and not a person. Shortly, after my challenges with that law firm, I fired them and searched on the internet where I found "The Lawrence Law Firm".  My first appointment was a face-to-face with Evelyn, then a phone conversation with the Lawyer Lawrence, whom would represent me, to discuss my situation for which he was positive and agreed to take my case. Maybe if I had gone through "The Lawrence Law Firm" from the start I would have been approved sooner.

From the initial appointment through the entire process I was able to call Evelyn with questions and she would either pick up or call me back immediately.  Each time something was required from SSD, Evelyn was contacting me even before I received my documentation from SSD via mail.  I also, remember the many times I was so upset and crying dealing with my medical condition; and Evelyn would always comfort me with her kind and compassionate words. Lawrence was also very encouraging and was on the phone with me coaching me and keeping me positive and explaining the laws.

I can go on and on...lol...so in summary...You can count on "The Lawrence Law Firm" to represent you for you Social Security Disability Claim.

An added note for all to understand...Lawyers have no control on the time SSD takes to review the claims submitted; but they know the laws and can make your claim process much smoother.

Good Luck and God Bless!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow. I can’t thank you enough for such a wonderful review. We really do care about our clients   We know that if we treat each one like family good things will happen.

reviews.text:
Thank you to anyone at Hill Orthopedic and Podiatry Center that was tasked to send a letter to my work about the care I received from a doctor I’ve tried to forget, but one I will never forget and feel the need to write a review about.

Years ago, while a senior in college home for summer break, I was involved in a serious car accident. I was a passenger in a friend’s vehicle that crashed in bad weather. Emergency responders cut me out of the car, and I was taken to the hospital with a broken ankle and tibia. Dr. Hill was the on-call physician that night. Arriving at the hospital, I was scared, in pain, and crying for my parents, who had not yet arrived. When Dr. Hill entered the room to assess my injuries, he appeared visibly annoyed from the moment he walked in. I tried to ask questions because I was frightened, but his responses were short, cold, and dismissive.

Eventually, I was taken to the surgical area and given anesthesia while waiting to be taken into surgery. I had never experienced pain or surgery like this before, and as they were preparing me, I began to cry. Dr. Hill responded by saying, “What’s wrong with her now? Is she crying for her mommy again?” That comment has stayed with me ever since. As I was being wheeled into surgery, my mother arrived. She could see how scared I was and asked if there was anything I wanted to say before they took me in. I wanted to tell her that I was scared to allow a doctor who had treated me this way to perform my surgery, but unfortunately, she arrived just as they were taking me in, so I went in feeling scared.

When I woke up from surgery, my parents were by my side. The first thing I said to them was, “Please don’t ever make me see that doctor again.” They could tell how shaken I was. It wasn’t until my post-surgery visit, when Dr. Hill again entered the room with the same annoyed and unkind demeanor, that my parents agreed no one should be treated this way and we needed to find another doctor. My experience with this doctor taught me at a young age the importance of choosing medical providers who treat patients with kindness and genuine care. I hope he has chosen to treat other patients better since then.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jillian, my name is Aaron and I just recently purchased Hill Orthopedic from Dr. Nathan Hill.  He will be retiring in a couple months and we have added 4 new providers since I have arrived to take his place and add more patient care to our practice.  I am very sorry to hear of your previous experience and I can understand how much it weighs on you.  Would you be up for a phone call so I can hear more about it and go over what I will be doing with it?  You can email me at aaron@hillorthopediccenter.com.  I would love to talk it through with you and at least I know you got my Christmas Card!

reviews.text:
Just had a appointment, had to wait about 2 hours for a broken toe. But when I tried to check in the lady at the front desk said that she was not checking in anybody and that I had to wait. The doctor walks in doesn't introduce himself and asked me if I was going to be mad at him for being late, the he wants to remove the tape on my toe by pulling it and then he is surprised that I complained of pain, he looks at me surprised I don't know what he was expecting ITS BROKEN!!,  I had a picture of the X-ray showing the fracture from Urgent Care so he saids that he can see it's broken and he doesn't need any more X-rays and then asked me what did I want to do, like what do you mean you are the doctor you are supposed to tell me.
I can get more information in the internet than wasting my time with this Orthopedic.  His attitude was of someone who didn't want to be bother, the "it's nothing", he did not tell me anything, so I ask if I could walk and he said yes just wear your snickers, nothing for the pain, nothing for how to care for the fracture toe or anything, I kept asking and his reply was you can do everything.
It's broken and I need a specialist and this specialist doesn't know anything.
When I walked out of the room the doctor is talking with a nurse just casually, making jokes small talk, no rush to see patients that have been waiting for a long time. What did I get out of this visit? a doctor that saw a picture of my foot and said "yes it looks broken", there is nothing to do come back in 4 to 6 weeks.  He retape my toe in such a bad way, a kid would have done a better job.
They didn't know about my insurance, it's a disorganized place.
Will not recommend this place ever to anybody.
I wasted my time and money.
I am so upset, angry and frustrated, and still in pain with no knowledge of what to do.
I'm going to see another Orthopedic and research online in the meantime.

reviews.text: Attorney Ramjeawan has successfully managed to dismiss my case..I am from South Africa, visiting the US. In spite of these documents, the arresting police took me to  jail...I was handcuffed!!! I was devastated and traumatised. I was released from jail the following  day after paying a bond of 500 US dollars. I was instructed to go to court and appear in front of a judge  for arraignment/Pre-trial.Then I sought the help of  Attorney Ramjeawan , based on his professional profile. Over the phone, his office they were supportive, professional and patient with me. Very kind people. I promptly got an appointment with Attorney Ramjeawan. During my meeting with him, Attorney Ramjeawan was very attentive to my story. He was very thorough and professional. Needless to say that his fees were far below those of other attorneys that I have contacted around. His fees were reasonable, Attorney Ramjeawan took into account my financial circumstances. I was impressed  by his calm attitude during our meeting, while I was emotional and perturbed, he was able to reassure me by explaining  the law and discussing with me  all available options. Attorney Ramjeawan went to extend of advising me to call him at anytime should I have any worrying issues or questions pertaining to my case, but for free, at no additional costs.  The good news for me is that Attorney Ramjeawan assisted me in this case, the court ended up dismissing it. The case is closed. I did not even appear in front of the judge. Her consultation fee was $200 ($100 per hour), and her retainer fee is $5,000. She requires $3,500 upfront and $1,500 the following month. I originally thought the payment plan would mean monthly installments, but it is only split into two payments. For me personally, that part was difficult, since I could manage monthly payments but not the full $3,500 upfront. Overall, I would give Attorney Bostick a 3.5 out of 5. The rating mainly reflects the payment structure not being flexible for my situation. reviews.text: From 1 to 10, I give this law firm an 11. From the first day I contacted them at the recommendation of a friend, they served me in a timely and organized manner. My case was stalled, and USCIS had revoked my application; I was in a situation of terrible stress and anxiety. Attorney Donato was very honest and serious with me from the first phone call, answering all my questions and showing me possible solutions. Thanks to God above all, and to Attorney Donato's professionalism, I emerged from a situation of uncertainty that I called "immigration coma," and today I am a permanent resident. God bless Attorney Donato and his assistants, Alisnette and Camilo. I recommended their advice to my sister, and they also helped her resolve her truly complex situation. She also obtained permanent residency.

Donato is a trustworthy attorney. He was very honest and clear when I explained my case to him. Thanks to his ethics, experience, and knowledge of immigration law, we were able to resolve my complex case successfully. His assistants, Camilo and Alisnette, were always kind and guided me throughout the entire process. I tried to adjust my immigration status myself, but it was impossible. Dealing with USCIS is very complex and stressful, so I wholeheartedly recommend Donato & Baez. Thanks to their professionalism, I now have my Green Card!
For me, they are one of the best immigration lawyers. I started my process with them and went all the way through. I highly recommend them; on a scale of one to ten, I give them a 10 out of 10.
Terrible service, awful customer service. They don't complete the paperwork and they keep your money.

Please seek legal counsel elsewhere Immediately! Do not give them your money!

UPDATE:  July 2025, I was advised I would not get a refund after being told I was already approvedfor a refund and Felicia just needed to approve it. HOWEVER, after 4 long months of going back and forth & being promised for a refund, they decided to not refund me and it is so disheartening and frustrating that a business can rob people like this. 😭 After all this time being told I would get a refund based on the circumstances of my case and that The refund was guaranteed; It was just a matter of when it was going to be sent out. THEN be told “after reviewing your account, you don’t qualify for a refund” when they reviewed my account several times and reassured me I would still get a refund on multiple occasions. This is highway robbery to the extreme! I lost out on 2,500 for them to nothing with my case and retaliate against me for writing this review.

Update 7/22/2025:

I have been reaching out about my refund for the past few months and they give me the run around and no one provides a solution. I still have not received my refund.

————————————///————————————

PLEASE TURN AWAY! Disbar immediately.

As a black woman who tries to support black female-owned businesses, The FAB Law Firm was highly disappointing to work with! I hired Ms. Felicia and her team for my divorce case, and was reassured I was in good hands during our initial consultation. HOWEVER, there a numerous of reasons listed below why I would NOT recommend them to anyone and hope they are disbarred relatively soon.

1. It is difficult to reach anyone to discuss your case because their policy states "allow 24 hours for a response" but, noone contacts you within 24 hours. They want you to follow the communication policy but, won't abide by their OWN policy.  Instead, you have to reach out with an aggressive manner and hope to get in contact with someone. I was told by the owner (Felicia Bunbury) that my calls were excessive after calling 5 times because no one was answering the chat, which they established for communication purposes, and no one was returning my phone calls during the scheduled times.

2. My other assigned attorney (Nyeza Guzman) did not return my calls as requested and I always felt rushed off the phone. Also, she eassured my documents were filed but, in fact they were not. Also, she would not call during the time we were scheduled to speak via telephone.

3. I was advised I would receive a refund due to reasons outside of me and it would be issued by the end of the following month...the month has passed and still no refund. I called to check the status and was scheduled to speak with Jessica, the office manager since being advised she handles all refunds. Jessica did not call at scheduled time INSTEAD sent a text message 30 minutes later stating she would get with Ms. Felicia since she handles refunds. This is beyond frustrating and comes across that I am getting the run-around with my refund.

In conclusion, I secured new counsel and confirmed the FAB Law Firm did not perform their duties as my legal counsel. It was a relief to be removed from them because they were putting additional stress on my situation. Furthermore, if I could give them 0 stars, I would. They should be reported to the Florida Bar because the lack of professionalism and performance is unacceptable. I would highly steer clear away from them and DO NOT give them your hard-earned money.

Extremely Disappointed – Poor Communication and Unethical Billing Practices

I had an extremely frustrating experience with this law firm during my divorce, which began in February 2024. Over the course of the case, I was assigned four different attorneys—all of whom left the firm abruptly. Twice, I wasn’t even notified that my attorney had left, leaving me completely in the dark during critical times in my case.

The firm constantly demanded that I maintain a $5,000 retainer, with little to no transparency about billing. The final bill I received was in February 2025 when the divorce was finalized. It is now July 2025, and the firm is still holding over $4,500 of my money with no refund in sight.
UPDATE:
OCTOBER 21, 2025 STILL TO DATE I HAVE NO RECIEVED MY REFUND!!

I’ve called multiple times, left messages, and submitted inquiries through the mandatory client portal—yet I’ve received zero response. They require you to book a phone appointment just to speak with someone, but even those scheduled calls are often missed with no follow-up.

This level of disorganization and lack of accountability is unacceptable, especially for a firm handling sensitive matters like divorce. I strongly urge others to consider different legal representation.

I really needed help with a case I'm filing against another person I went to visit the FAB law firm and they gave me the information that I needed and explained exactly what I could or couldn't do. I think that they are a Plus for people who can't afford a private attorney. I would recommend them to everyone I know.

0 of 5 stars Extremely frustrated in their services. Unable to contact them in any way possible. I’m still currently retained but they will not contact me. Gregory in billing illegally overcharged my account and is refusing to reimburse me.
Their drafting is very precise. The contract they prepared for my business deal covered things I hadn’t even thought of. Thank you!

My mom and I needed to do power of attorney papers and had no idea what to do. We went to their office. They had us fill out some forms and then discussed with my mom what she was going to do. We went for lunch and came back and they had everything all done for us. They went through each and every detail with my mom and were very thorough. I recommend them for people who are not sure of what to do regarding legal papers, including Wills. Truly heaven sent for us. Thank you

I was able to hire an attorney and get residential custody of my son away from his heroin addicted mother. Once that happened however I was overwhelmed by all of the costs and paperwork involved. FAB law firm was able to hook me up with a great social worker who walked me through getting insurance for my son. Highly recommend them!

I was referred to them by a good friend of mine. I was in need of an attorney who handled personal injury. They have been very upfront , very informative, and I wasn't happy with the place I was going to for my physical therapy. They referred me to another place. The new doctor was fantastic. I would highly recommend the FAB Law firm to anyone in need
I liked how they gave me options whether to settle out of court or go for litigation and let me decide what suited me.

All of the staff members were incredibly nice and professional. They were not only helpful but also genuinely great to work with. It’s rare to find a team that makes a legal process feel this smooth and stress-free. I truly felt like I was in good hands the entire time. Thank you the FAB law firm!

I had a great experience working with this law firm. From the very beginning, their communication was excellent,clear, timely, and consistent. Every time I had a question or needed an update, someone was quick to respond and made sure I fully understood what was going on. Highly recommend

I had an exceptional experience at this firm. From the very first contact, he was more than just an advisor he was a true ally throughout the entire process.He explained every detail with patience and clarity that really made a difference for me. They not only handled my case with professionalism but also showed a genuine empathy that made me feel supported and understood every step of the way.I highly recommend them!

I was recommended to use attorney Lakeshia for my child custody case. I filed an appeal that was very time sensitive. The lack of communication and response to my phone call and messages caused my appeal to be dismissed. After the appeal was dismissed I finally get a phone call from Lakeshia to look over my case for $500. Fee paid and I must say Lakeshia gave me a peace of mind with how she would handle my case. Next step, I was sent an invoice for retainer fee of $5000. I felt pretty strong about retaining Lakeshia except the fact that communication was horrible. I had a couple of questions before retaining Lakeshia but I could never get in touch with anyone or get a call back. The lack of communication made me decide to go elsewhere. I wished it would have worked out with Lakeshia but I didn't trust communication would be satisfying.

DO NOT USE THIS FIRM!!! No matter how well your free consultation goes with the owner, stay far far away from this law firm! This firm cares ONLY about the money and not about their actual clients. The owner will make you feel heard and seen during the consultation but then pawn you off to another lawyer in the firm and you’ll be lucky if you get to keep that same lawyer the whole time and not get passed off to other lawyers in the firm without any notice or reasoning. I felt like I did all the work my lawyer was supposed to do, my lawyer never remembered anything I had told him in our previous meetings, they constantly lost paperwork I know I submitted to them so they made me send the same paperwork multiple times, and at the end of it I felt like I got nothing out of it that I wanted. Once everything was said and done I paid around 15k in lawyer fees for a custody case/child support where me and the opposing side agreed on everything except time sharing schedule and child support which is why I initially contacted a lawyer so I could have someone who actually wanted to fight for my side!!!! The outcome of it…they (my lawyer) made me settle for $0 in child support and I got less custody than I originally had before going to court (I had 60/40 and now I have 50/50). On top of that I never received a refund for the remaining money I had left over in my retainer, even after I was told at the beginning that anything left over would be sent back to me! I paid a $4500 retainer after we finished mediation because we still couldn’t come to an agreement on time sharing so we had to go infront of a judge. But literally the NEXT DAY after paying the $4500 the opposing side submitted another offer for time sharing and child support in which I didn’t agree with but my lawyer said this was my best option (which it wasn’t considering the history of negligence with opposing side). So I ended up just agreeing bc I lost hope. After asking about a refund for the $4500 I was transferred multiple times, left multiple voicemails, was told someone is working on it and it shouldn’t be a problem, and then after 6 months of waiting on a response the firm completed ghosted me!!! They stole $4500 from a single mother! This law firm is full of thieves, they are incredibly unprofessional, disorganized, lazy, liars, and an absolute disappointment. I would’ve been better off representing myself rather than using this firm. They use a communication app called Cleo and have no other way of getting in contact with the lawyer you’re assigned to when time sensitive emergencies arise. Please do yourself a favor and do not use this law firm!!! Listen to the other horrible reviews they have and don’t make the same mistake I did and many other people did with choose this firm to represent them.

Update 2 months later:
After posting this review 2 months ago, Felicia very shortly after contacted me and wanted to talk about why I was so unhappy with their services. I told her I was only willing to speak about the refund. I got an email from Jessica giving me the breakdown of my final bill with the refund amounts (I had 2). I got the smaller refund that same week but the larger amount they said I’d be getting by the end of next month (April). Once May came around I decided to contact Jessica to check in about my refund. I honestly feel like I’m having déjà vu from when my case originally ended and I was trying to get my refund. She said Felicia had to approve it and she’d get back to me with an update. Well I contacted Felicia as well because she gave me her direct line and I am being completely ignored now. This has been going on for a year trying to get this refund from them! I still have no update other than that they’re a couple of days behind on refunds (it’s been 2 weeks now since I was supposed to receive it…but if we want to get technical I was supposed to have my refund LAST YEAR) and Felicia has continued to ignore my phone calls AND my texts.

The FAB Law firm is a lifesaver they came to my rescue and my grandson's rescue and they are so professional my lawyer is wonderful and I can't thank them for taking on my case they have protected me and care about the people out there that need help thank you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi, Avery. We appreciate the kind words and are glad we could provide you with a positive experience!

reviews.text: This law firm is highly unprofessional as they didn’t notify me that my present attorney is no longer with the firm and I have an upcoming court case dated for may 7, I will be reporting this firm to the Florida bar. Save your money and do not go with this firm. The owner Felicia Bunbury is highly unprofessional and the other receptionist that they have answering the calls. This firm need to get shut down immediately!!

I was really hopeful about working with this office, but unfortunately, I can’t say I had a great experience — and we didn’t even make it through the initial consultation. I had a scheduled consultation for 3:00 PM. At 3:03 PM, I called just to make sure I hadn’t missed the call and was told I’d be receiving it shortly. By 3:35 PM, I still hadn’t heard anything, so I called again and was informed the attorney had an emergency. I completely understand that things happen — life is unpredictable — but I had stepped out of work for over 30 minutes for this call and didn’t receive any communication letting me know there would be a delay or cancellation.

I was then rescheduled for 9:45 AM the following morning. I received a confirmation call at 9:00 AM and confirmed the appointment. Again, I stepped out of work around 9:40 AM and waited — but by 10:17 AM, I had still not received a call. I contacted the office and informed them. The gentleman who answered was kind and did his part, but unfortunately, the lack of communication from the attorney’s side came off as unprofessional and disappointing.
Very energized and professional lawyer. Ready to fight for my position, ready to take the blows directed ate AND return the with equal force. A fighter.

reviews.text: Do yourself a favor and don’t use this firm. They were the worst. They don’t communicate. I sent a file that they rejected. All they would say was “rejected, send again”. No reason why I’d how they needed it. Took several times of asking what I did wrong and how they wanted it. They included my name change in the paperwork to send the judge but removed it before sending to judge. Too another 3 months to get my name change and a huge ordeal to get them to answer my questions and get them to file it. Took almost 6 months after divorce was final to get the remainder of my retainer. Also many calls to them and them telling me I’d receive a call from billing. Like pulling teeth with these people. They turned a very difficult situation into a much more difficult one. They never apologized for missing my name change. Several times, they said they were sending it in that day but they didn’t. At first they were not willing to file it, until the courthouse emailed them about it. I know because I was copied on this email. Bottom line, do NOT use this law firm unless you don’t mind incompetence. And enjoy being jerked around.

If there were anything lower than one star, it still wouldn’t do justice to how horrible this firm is. This law firm is a complete scam, money-hungry, and will play with your emotions while giving you excuses. They claim there’s a fixed rate to get the job done, but once you pay them, they just keep asking for more money, and in the end, they accomplish nothing. !!!!Stay away from them!!!

Stay away! Communication is horrible. The only good communication you will get is when is about taking your money.They had no problem calling me at 8:12am to make a payment. Yet I asked for updates on a document that needed to be signed 3 weeks ago and I’m still waiting. They promised so many things and get nothing done. I changed attorneys because the previous one ( Neyza Guzman) wasn’t doing anything  and is still the same issue. New attorney ( Lakeisha Dunbar) I was told to remove the previous reviews I had given them here and I was assigned a new attorney and promised that this time would be different but is not. I have read every single bad review here and I believe every single one of them. I will also be filing a complaint to the BBB, the attorney General’s office and have already filed a complaint to the Florida bar. This is unacceptable! Do not hire them as your attorney . They take advantage of your situation.

Loved to work with Oscar, in 6 months I feel he was the only one who tried to help me at the end. After being charge more than 6k and the only thing i got done was paperwork and 1 videocall on court. THERE IS NO DOUBT my experience was horrible. they don’t have any sensitivity towards the client. As a company they only cared about the money. Even if you request to get a call to ask a question they will charge you. I would NEVER RECOMMEND THIS LAWYER unless you have tons of money and just don’t care to get ripped apart economically.

EDIT: When you think they can’t be any worse then they proof you wrong. After requesting for them to drop out of my case because they only cared to just drowning me in debt, I made sure my account was clear (I got my receipt) and I let them go. I end up continuing my case with court self help, within 6 months I was able to do closure of my case. On November 2024 a week later after closing my case they started calling me stating they wanted to charge me more than $400 because they were CLOSING MY CASE ON THEIR SYSTEM! Ridiculous, I went into a huge argument with billing, receptionist, even the supposedly owner got involved and NOBODY was able to convince me why should I pay almost 500 dollars for them to do closure on their system and their closure has no relation whatsoever with court records. They end up sending this account to collection which I provided clarification to them that this charge was not justified because I have my statement that my account was 0 when I let them go on May 2024.

Well, unfortunately, today I did what I should have done before entrusting my case to them: read the reviews… typical lawyers sell their cases… but who can stand up against them? I've asked for the entire case file three times now, and they still haven't given it to me. On the contrary, they're forcing me to make a decision I never wanted to make, and I've already filed everything. They won't even give me my file so I can get a second opinion. I've received two calls pressuring me to drop the case, even though I was the victim. Does anyone know the number where I can send someone to do an investigation? I've never seen a law firm screwing over their clients like that! 🤣🤣🤣 And I sit here wondering how stupid I was not to do what I'm doing now, when in my case it's the guilty party's lawyers against me, and my lawyers (these people) are against me. But since Ellis decided not to go to court, God help us. They've left a family completely destroyed, but I'm doing my part so that others smarter than me don't have to go through the same thing.
reviews.ownerResponse: At Martinez Manglardi, we fight for every client as if they were a part of our family. We would never force to make any decision that they do not want to make. It is our understanding that you already have a copy of the file. Unfortunately, Florida Bar Rules prevent us from talking about the specifics of your case on the internet. Please contact our office immediately if you have any concerns regarding your case.

reviews.text:
How can I even describe the TERRIBLE service we received from a law firm that ultimately resolves absolutely nothing? Their phone service is simply awful. I spent two days trying to contact the person supposedly handling our case (there are two of us affected). The first day I called, someone else was on the line and said they would call me back, but they never did. Hoping to find a solution, the person who answered put me on hold, and when they came back, they said the person who was supposed to help me had gone to lunch. Okay, I asked when she would be back, and I waited for her to call me back because that's what she said. They never called me back. I called again, still hopeful, and it was the same story: another call on hold, only for the person who answered to tell me she would help me. Can you believe it? When I explained the situation again, they told me that in my case, we had to cover the medical expenses since the case was dismissed and it would be our responsibility. That's not what we were told, and now who's supposed to cover the X-ray costs? Thank God the physical therapy never even started because just as it was about to begin, they told us the case was dismissed due to the other person injured in the accident. Great! Truly, a completely...TERRIBLE service!!!!!

Unfortunately, I had to write about my bad experience so that others don't have to go through the same thing.

P.S. While I was writing this review, I received a call from the office asking how they could help me because they had received a message about my call. What a coincidence, right? And she identified herself as a paralegal, just like many of the negative reviews here mention—that you never actually get to see a lawyer.

So I have to put a star to be able to publish my message, oh well, but don't get too excited because for me it's 🚫 0 stars
reviews.ownerResponse:
We sincerely regret hearing about your experience with our office. Attorneys' ethical rules prevent us from addressing the specifics of your case, but we can respond in general terms.

Our firm accepts cases on a contingency fee basis, meaning we only charge clients if and when the case is successfully resolved. Once we open a case, we begin gathering information about the cause of the accident, the extent of the injuries and medical treatments, and the availability of insurance coverage.

Occasionally, our investigation reveals that no applicable insurance coverage exists. In such situations, if we determine that financial recovery is impossible or highly unlikely, we withdraw from the case. When this occurs, the client owes no fees or costs to our firm. We also recommend that clients seek a second opinion from another firm if they wish to proceed.

We sincerely regret that we were unable to help you obtain compensation in your case. If you still have questions, please feel free to contact our office to schedule a consultation with an attorney. Otherwise, we recommend approaching another firm for further evaluation.

reviews.text: Terrible experience with this law firm. Getting in touch with the paralegal handling your case is extremely difficult; forget about a lawyer actually seeing your case—it's all handled by a paralegal. I had to make several contact requests just to get them to get in touch. They handled my case for a month, and during that time, all they did was check if my policy included coverage they could claim on. If your insurance doesn't include it, you're wasting your time with them. During that entire month, they also failed to send my information to the insurance company to claim the PIP insurance I was entitled to. Therefore, I wasted all this time with their representation (information provided by my insurance company) only to be told later that they wouldn't take my case. The paralegal gave me conflicting information constantly; one day she'd say one thing, and the next day something completely different. Your insurance company won't give you information if you have legal representation, and even though they tell you they won't take your case, they take two weeks to send the letter to the insurance company informing you that they no longer represent you. If you have an accident, find out exactly what you're getting into before entrusting your case to this type of firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so sorry you had such a negative experience, Carolina. We appreciate you sharing your concerns with us and sincerely regret the lack of communication and attention you received. We will work to improve our processes and customer service to prevent situations like this in the future. Your feedback is very valuable, and we want to ensure that no other customer has to go through what you experienced.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Salim,
Your case was a jury trial. In this type of case, there are two ways the state can prove guilt. If they show test results at a certain level through admission of those results into evidence, that is per se proof of guilt. Your test results provided the state with that kind of evidence and had it been admitted, the jury most likely would have found you guilty on that alone. The second way is somewhat more difficult for the state because instead of scientific evidence of proof, the jury is left with their perceptions of the other evidence in the case. viz. witness testimony and documentary evidence (video). There is often, as there was in your case, video evidence. You complain that I did not provide you with the level of service that you expected, but I filed a motion that, upon hearing, resulted in the exclusion of the test results that would have provided the state with undeniable and conclusive evidence of your guilt. As any criminal defense attorney will tell you, a motion to exclude scientific evidence is very difficult to attain and has to be handled with skill to be successful. We were successful. The jury was then left with the other evidence in the case which was the testimony and the video. This body of evidence, while not conclusive, is still legally sufficient to support a guilty verdict. The jury found you guilty. They could have found you not guilty if they were of that opinion and you would no doubt in that event have submitted a very different review. As it is, you complain as if it's my fault that the jury reached the conclusion that they did. The jury asked to see the video again during their deliberations perhaps in an effort to confirm some of the arguments I made about it. It's hard to say since we are not privy to their deliberations, I try cases more frequently than many lawyers and the fact is that I win more than I lose, but, as every trial lawyer will agree, a case before a jury will sometimes result in an adverse verdict. It happens even despite our best efforts. I believe the jury gave your case due consideration and they carefully considered their verdict. In my experience, juries take their role seriously and they generally try to do the right thing. In this case, the verdict did not go our way, but the court did not sentence you to anything other than the statutory minimums which penalties were less than what the state wanted on a plea. In that sense, your case was a win. The only reason you had a chance at all was due to my efforts in getting the test results excluded. You never related any misgivings about the level of service you got from us until now, months later. You were represented professionally and skillfully and I apologize for nothing.

Last July 2025 we contacted Iqbal’s Law firm for our Immigration concern/questions. They set me up for a Free 1 hour consultation with Atty. Maheen. We Decided to get the Spouse package.
