That is really a bonus part for us. I appreciate how she responded to my text/call, day in and out! On our day of interview, we opted her to come with us for moral and legal support. I’m incredibly grateful to Maheen Iqbal for guiding me through my green card process. We filed my case on March 25th, and by October 26th, just about seven months later, my case was approved.

Throughout what could have been a stressful journey, Maheen made everything so much easier. We did run into an RFE because of a minor issue with the affidavit of support, but she helped us fix it quickly. She was also there with me during the interview, which made the entire interview process really smooth and comfortable.

I truly appreciate all her help and would highly recommend her to anyone going through the same process!

They gave me a free consultation and answered all my questions when other attorneys wanted hundreds of dollars for a couple questions, it shows they actually have compassion for their clients and care about what they do. Ultimately I didn’t need an attorney which thankfully saved me money, but if one were ever necessary I won’t hesitate to go with IQBAL!

Edited for updated status- I highly DO NOT recommend using her services!
We retained Ms Mageen again for my husband’s work authorization case that has to be renewed every 2 years. She filed his previous renewal application in 2023. Uscis updated the I765 form on 4/1/24. Ms Mageen likely copied the previous application and submitted on the outdated forms resulting in my husband’s case being rejected and causing a significant delay in the processing of the resubmission on the proper forms. Upon politely questioning of how this happened ms Mageen became defensive, refused to take responsibility for the mistake and was rude, disrespectful and dismissive towards me, blaming the uscis for changing the forms.
Everyone makes mistakes sometimes, her lack of responsibility and unapologetic reaction was unacceptable and cost us nearly 2 months of wages, loss of health insurance and other benefits along with an unimaginable amount of stress. Instead of doing her best to rectify the mistake that she made she amplified an already terrible situation with her lack of empathy and respect.
Think twice before making the decision to trust her with your own case, I wouldn’t wish this experience on anyone else.

reviews.text: Honest and reliable law firm. Would recommend to anyone.

I highly recommend Stewart for his outstanding service! He worked tirelessly throughout the entire transaction, providing consistent support and guidance that gave both us and our buyer total confidence every step of the way. Their dedication and professionalism led to a smooth and successful closing. Grateful for their commitment and excellent communication!

I’ve had the pleasure of knowing Attorney Stewar Tavarez since his law school days, as his sister worked with me on various fashion projects. Years later, our professional paths aligned in real estate, and I chose Tavarez Law, P.A. to handle my clients’ and customers’ transactions—and it was one of the best decisions I’ve made.

Real estate transactions can be complex, especially when dealing with international buyers and sellers. From arranging closings at embassies or virtually, to navigating FIRPTA requirements and other legal intricacies, having the right legal team makes all the difference. Stewar and his firm consistently go above and beyond to ensure everything is handled with precision, professionalism, and care.

Stewar is truly a key part of my team—he’s always just one call or email away from getting another deal to the finish line. Even when I’m traveling, I know my closings are in excellent hands. My entire team and I are extremely happy with the services provided by Dr. Tavarez, and I highly recommend Tavarez Law, P.A. to any real estate professional seeking a reliable, knowledgeable, and dedicated legal partner.

We recommend Tavarez Law, P.A. to handle your real estate closings! Our real estate team has been working with Attorney Stewar for many years now and the service and communication is excellent. As a Seller, you normally choose the title company you want to work with and a sucessful closing will happen with Tavarez Law!
Very detailed. Great communication. I always knew what was happening with my case.  Great customer service.  Represented my case so well!

Stewar Tavarez helped my wife and I with our first home purchase and they did an outstanding job. He was open and honest with us and was always available when we had any questions. We will definitely be using Tavarez law for all our future needs and I would recommend them to anyone.
Thank you for helping us with the Short Sale! The whole deal was possible only because of you. All the best to you and your associates!

Stewar Tavarez served as my real estate agent when I purchased my first home. He was extremely professional throughout the entire process. He was always available to answer my questions and to provide me with status updates. With his help, I found my beautiful home at a great price. I highly recommend Stewar Tavarez with Tavarez Law for any real estate needs.

If you are looking for a firm that really cares about their clients, stop looking because Mr. Tavarez is the attorney you need. I have previous experiences with large firms where I did not have the one by one attention I need, and they ended up stealing my money. I had been using Tavarez Law for all my business matters, and Mr. Tavarez was always there for me and my company. I definitely recommend Mr. Tavarez and his firm.
Thank you Tavarez Law Firm for your professionalism and the expeditious process of the sale of our business. You have are highest recommendations!

Mr. Tavarez helped us in a real estate transaction. He was so helpful and professional and made our stressful situation so much easier to handle. He is a true professional and his character is a great representation of what his company stands for. I will use him time and time again.

We have been using Tavarez Law for a time now. I am very happy with their services. I really like the fact that the lawyer is very reachable. He has been always there to answer our questions. This law firm is reliable. honest and reachable. Thanks for all the work you do for us!
Very honest and very trustworthy. They were very helpful and willing to explain everything in the closing process. Thank you so much Tavarez Law, for all your help.

The Best Lawyer in Kissimmee FL

I spoke with Kimberly today concerning my grandson's case.  She was very professional,  polite, understanding and knowledgeable.   Although I haven't retained her as of yet,  she took the time to answer all of my questions and addressed my concerns.  I highly recommend Kimberly and this law firm.

Although our case has only just begun, I already feel so grateful for the incredible support from Migdalia Perez and their staff. From the first meeting, they’ve treated us with compassion, respect, and professionalism.

They’ve taken the time to explain everything clearly and have been quick to answer our questions, making a difficult situation easier to bear. It’s rare to find a team that makes you feel both confident and cared for at the same time.

Thank you, Migdalia Perez and your team, for walking with us through this journey with such dedication and heart.

I want to sincerely thank Attorney Kim LaSure for the outstanding support and representation she provided when my husband, R, received an unexpected citation just after leaving the DMV. We didn’t realize we needed a new plate issued, and what seemed like a simple mistake turned into a charge that could’ve seriously impacted his CDL—and his livelihood.

After reaching out to multiple attorneys, Kim stood out immediately. While others were cold or impersonal, she was kind, responsive, and clearly stated her fees. She contacted us personally and took the time to explain everything clearly without judgment.

Kim handled every part of the process with care and professionalism. She told us exactly what was needed, communicated when necessary, and—thanks to her—R didn’t even have to appear in court. She managed everything from start to finish with exceptional attention to detail and service.

We’re incredibly grateful for her help and can’t recommend her highly enough. If you want an attorney who genuinely cares and delivers results, Kim LaSure is the one you want in your corner.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Knowing that my kindness, responsiveness, and clear communication made a difference is incredibly rewarding. I'm so glad I could handle the process professionally, ensure R didn't have to appear in court, and ultimately deliver the results you were hoping for. Thank you again for your recommendation!

reviews.text:
My sincere gratitude to Attorney Viviana and her talented team for the excellent work they did in successfully obtaining my permanent residency with my family.

This success story arose from my academic and professional journey. Thanks to the hard work of the entire team at the Law Office of Viviana Medina, they demonstrated to the United States government how these achievements met the multiple legal requirements necessary to obtain my residency, which could be extended to my family.

From the first moment I contacted Attorney Viviana Medina, she demonstrated clarity and placed the necessary trust in me, which further fueled my hopes, and I was right.

Throughout the nearly two years that this challenge lasted, her team demonstrated exceptional skill in presenting the necessary elements in a timely manner. The organization and argumentative skills presented were impressive.

I would like to highlight her timely attention and continuous communication, as everything moved forward while I was living in my home country. Today, thanks to your dedication and effort, my family and I are enjoying our permanent residence in the United States.

I wish you, Attorney Viviana, and your entire wonderful team blessings. Beyond a legal settlement, be proud of your ability to transform dreams into reality.

With gratitude and appreciation.

Marcel

reviews.ownerResponse: I was at an immigration appointment in Tampa, and it ended much later than expected. Even so, we called this person and extended the courtesy of a free consultation since she was referred by the woman from my hometown. We explained that we were running late from Tampa and there was heavy traffic. The priority is attending to clients with more urgent needs. An immigration interview is more important than attending to a potential client. I know you wouldn't want to be left stranded if your day in court was delayed so you could go out and see a potential client. It's lucky you left, because I don't need clients like you. I'll let the woman from my hometown know to be more careful when referring people like you.

reviews.text: I hired Mr. Hernan last year for a guardianship case. I paid him 1,000.00 to started the process. After a few weeks I called his office to find out about the case and if he needed anything else from me. The man was never in his office, the secretary lied to me telling me he was away, sick or in the courthouse handling a case. To make a long story short, the man never filed anything at the court for me, never answered my calls and took my 1,000.00 dollars. Do not put your case or your money on this individual hands. P.S. I paid you for the first meeting, and you told me that in order to started the process you charge 1,000.00 for the investigation which you never did, but God is the best lawyer of all, and the best judge as well. Do not replied to me with things that you know are not true. You didn’t even statutes the “investiga” which you said the 1.000.00 were for. Good bless you. I paid you 100$ at first and our first meeting was less than an hour.
reviews.ownerResponse:
This person did not retain me to do a guardianship, but to investigate the possibility of have a legal action against her ex-mother in law, to have an insurance claim on behalf of her children for their deceased father. Also, I investigated the possible wrongful death case of her ex on behalf of her children. I charged her $1,000.00, for my time which exceeded 5 hours (my normal rate is $350.00, an hour). All her calls were answered by my secretary and wife, who knows her personally and received all her calls on her personal telephone. In the few ocassions she was told I was sick, I was either in the hospital or at home. I suffer diabetes and chronic kidney disease, and it makes me spend at times time having medical attention. Nevertheless, my secretary and wife keeps clients informed, and in over 20 years of practice, I have not failed to appear for a hearing or event affecting my clients. The fact that I was not able to take the wrongful death case because it was out of state, or that we were not able to assist her with the guardianship, does not mean I was not able to provide legal advise and refer her to an out of state attorney to handle her case, after researching for her.
This is an ill-intended review made by a person who thinks my time has no value. Attorneys sell time and knowledge, not bread.

reviews.text: The experience dealing with this office and John was very disappointing and unprofessional.  Proceed with caution.  Start by calling the office and seeing what you get.  Paying $60 for the 9 minute consultation that resulted in him telling me his fee to write an eviction notice and having the tenant served was $2500 and could be higher if it went to court, then being offended when I asked what I got for the $2500.  Find a traditional attorney that bills an hourly rate and won’t be an hour late for the scheduled call.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Our office charges a fee for a normal residential eviction process and you received a quote for the process, not just a letter. I understand you may be unfamiliar with the eviction process in Florida and what it entails. As I recalled you ended the consultation, not me as you were not satisfied we our fee and evidently did not understand that an eviction process may not just be writing a letter. Typically, our consultations are "in-person" at our office, however, since you were out-of-state we made an exception and provided you with a phone consultation. We provided you we an approximate time that a call would be made as I had other office appointments on that day. I did not limit the amount of time for your phone consultation nor did I ended it, you did.


Best Wishes,

John
